cached_blueprint:
Task title: Create Checkers game
Task description: I want a really fun and entertaining checkers game. It should spark my interest and intrigue me to play it everyday.
Requirements: 
Project type: nextjs
Scaffold command: npx create-next-app@latest ./ --typescript --tailwind --eslint --app --no-src-dir --import-alias @/* --yes --force --no-git --skip-install

Implementation blueprint:
Step 1: Establish a compatible Next.js foundation for checkers game i want a really fun and. Create the root layout, global styling primitives, and any package or config updates required for a clean install and production build. Make the app shell responsive and production-ready so later feature work lands on stable scaffolding.
Files: app/layout.tsx, app/globals.css

Step 2: Implement the main checkers game i want a really fun and experience in the primary page and supporting components. Translate the task requirements into concrete UI sections, data presentation, and user interactions instead of generic placeholder content. Ensure the page reflects the task's actual workflows, edge states, and visual hierarchy.
Files: app/page.tsx, components/MainExperience.tsx

Step 3: Harden the implementation for autonomous delivery. Add any supporting helpers, polish incomplete states, and remove fragile dependencies or imports that would break npm install or npm run build. Finish with production-focused cleanup so the tester sees clear progress and a stable build.
Files: components/StatusPanel.tsx, lib/mock-data.ts
